query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, error_message,
       FROM_UNIXTIME(started_at/1000) as started, 
       FROM_UNIXTIME(finished_at/1000) as finished
FROM sync_logs 
WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND entity = 'all'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, error_message,
       FROM_UNIXTIME(started_at/1000) as started, 
       FROM_UNIXTIME(finished_at/1000) as finished
FROM sync_logs 
WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND entity = 'all'
ORDER BY id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
